notes: SHIP v1.14.219 — 3D RACK RENDER FIX (per HANDOFF-3d-rack-render-fix.md, base .218). Fixes the on-device glitches John saw in the .218 3D view (tapering purple slab, striped flicker, dead MINI) while keeping the dramatic look. Code-only in rackElevation_render3D (dct-ios.html) + CACHE_VERSION bump; no asset/markup/CSS change (three.min.js already precached in .218). FIXES: (1) BALLOON/TAPER — replaced the old rack-group-rotation + fixed-camera model with a proper CAMERA SPHERICAL ORBIT around the rack center: FOV 32, fitDist=(RH*0.60)/tan(FOV/2) frames the FULL rack height, camera.position=(sin(theta)*D, elev*D, cos(theta)*D) with D=fitDist*zoom, camera.lookAt(0,0,0) EVERY frame so it never skews; drag maps horizontal->theta, vertical->elev (clamped -0.15..0.5 so it can't tip into a bad angle); rack group is now stationary. (2) STRIPED FLICKER (z-fighting) — tray box height now (uEnd-uStart+1)*uH - 0.06 (was -0.05); the 0.06 gap keeps faces non-coplanar; trays stay OPAQUE. (3) ALL-PURPLE MASS — trays now colored by a view-specific palette matching MOCKUP-rack-threejs.html (compute cyan #5cf2ff / switch violet #b478ff / power gold #ffd60a / cdu+storage teal #3fd0c8 / aux slate), each its own opaque MeshStandardMaterial. DEVIATION (reported): this 3D palette is DELIBERATELY distinct from the 2D FLAT TYPE_COLORS legend (where gpu=violet, switch=cyan) — John's LOCKED SETTINGS approved the mock's compute=cyan/switch=violet scheme, so 3D uses that; 2D FLAT unchanged. If you want 2D/3D to share one palette, that's a one-line follow-up. (4) DEAD MINI SCRUBBER — wired: dragging the minimap (#scrubbar/#scrubbarTrack) maps pointer-Y -> U (top=high U, bottom=U1) and moves a translucent cyan HIGHLIGHT BAND mesh to that U's Y in the scene, plus moves the (now-revealed) #scrubbarHandle; the FLAT scroll-sync (rackHybrid_initSync) no-ops in 3D (hidden #rackCanvas) and my handler registers after it so it wins the handle position; scrubber listeners removed + handle re-hidden on teardown. LOCKED SETTINGS applied verbatim: RW=6.0, RD=2.7, uH=0.34, tray gap 0.06, idle auto-spin theta+=0.0016, fog FogExp2(0x06090f,0.018), lights ambient 0x243040@1.05 + key 0xbfe9ff@0.9 + violet rim 0x9b59ff@0.55 + cyan point 0x5cf2ff@0.5 near front, ground disc. Zoom via pinch/wheel (zoom factor 0.55..1.7). All .218 lifecycle guards PRESERVED: canvas.isConnected self-dispose on nav-away, zero-size/hidden-mount abort, ensure3D late-resolve guard, forceContextLoss teardown, single-context invariant, _rmConnHit uses rack.rackId. Gates: node --check sw.js + inline HTML blocks · CSS braces unchanged · CRLF preserved · three.min.js present · three-stamp lockstep .218->.219. ROLLBACK: git revert (restores the .218 render). DEVICE-VERIFY (hard stop): remove+re-add PWA, confirm v1.14.219, then in the rack-detail 3D view: (1) rack renders as a STRAIGHT full-height cabinet (no taper) at ALL orbit angles; (2) NO flicker on tray faces (gaps present); (3) trays are DISTINCTLY colored (cyan compute / violet switch / gold power), not one mass; (4) drag the MINI handle top<->bottom → cyan highlight band tracks the U; the rack does NOT spin while scrubbing; (5) rack width looks like the approved mock (RW=6.0); (6) drag orbit tilts within clamp (never balloons), pinch zooms, idle auto-spins; (7) tap a tray → correct device sheet; (8) ?legacy=1 untouched, FLAT still the instant default; (9) toggle FLAT<->3D and nav away → no runaway loop / no orphan GPU (regression-check the .218 fixes).
